case_title: CITY & COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO VS CANIZALES, DALIA

SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION MAR-28-2003, CONTINUED BY COURT TO MAY-02-2003 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506 AT PLAINTIFF'S REQUEST.
SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION MAY-02-2003, CONTINUED BY COURT TO JUL-03-2003 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506 PER PLTF'S REQUEST.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CITY & COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO OFFICE OF THE TREASURER & TAX COLLECTOR RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT CANIZALES, DALIA $4,995.40 PRINCIPAL, $25.50 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $5,020.90 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT TO DEFT DALIA CANIZALES, RETURNED UNDELIVERED. ATTEMPTED, NOT KNOWN.
